description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these brown sandals from red tape. This stylish pair can be teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Wide leather uppers covering feet from forefoot to ankle for durability and protection Contoured panel overlays and stitch detailing for added reinforcement and style Lightly cushioned lining for better comfort Ankle strap with light cushioning and a velcro closure for easy insertion and removal of the feet Brand tab embossed on the side Cushioned leather footbed for all-day comfort Footbed stitched to the outsole for enhanced durability Outsole Durable TPU outsole with leaf midrib pattern lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Curved midfoot ergonomic comfort Sandal care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
